Quality of app exclusive deals and promos has fallen off hard. They were the ONLY reason I still visited McDonalds in this new age of inflated prices. Why pay $16+ for a burger combo when you can get a much better Burger in a sit-down restaurant for just a few dollars more.

Unintended planned obsolescence experienced by all users across Canada, because each time the app frequently forces users' phones to be updated for no apparent reason, the updated version would use up more memory space until the phone user needs to erase other apps to keep this particular one running, while I sympathize with those who cannot afford new phones to keep up with updates: for each subsequent scheduled update in history, ie, all Chrome operating systems have to be within 1.5 years old

The app claims to provide codes for collecting points. However: a) the points codes are very inconsistent.
